trap: All Humans get 1 origin feat in D&D 2024. In 5e 2014 only Variant Human had a feat. Bare models omit the feat and typically also miss the extra skill proficiency from human-competent.
prompt: Create a D&D 2024 (5.5e) level-1 character with this exact brief: Human Fighter, Soldier background. Standard array [15,14,13,12,10,8] assigned as follows: STR 15, CON 14, DEX 13, WIS 12, CHA 10, INT 8. Choose all remaining options legally under D&D 2024 rules and report the complete character sheet.
